creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
I think you have an issue with pkg repositories, it looks like you might be searching two repos. Maybe caching or a proxy server is bouncing you between two pkg repos.

The current version of opensubdiv in the official ports tree is 3.4.3_4 and has the TBB option disabled. You also show installing osd 3.4.4 which has TBB enabled.


When you first updated, it chose to update osd to 3.4.4 bringing in tbb and removing onetbb and ports using it.

Next update it went back to osd 3.4.3 with TBB disabled allowing blender to install.

Then it went back to osd 3.4.4 using tbb and removing the onetbb ports.
